# STRAT.040 ? Adaptive Leadership (Heifetz)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** leadership_frameworks
**Domain:** LEADERSHIP_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Technical vs adaptive challenges; get on balcony; regulate distress; maintain disciplined attention; give work back; protect voices

## Application
Distinguish problem types; gain perspective; productive disequilibrium; keep focus on hard issues; empower others; protect dissent

## Key Values
- Adaptive work
- Perspective
- Productive tension
- Distributed leadership
- Dissent protection

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, leadership_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
